description: Prompt konfiguracyjny dla FLUX do generowania emotki Tylera — styl AbsurdStyle444. Kontrolowany chaos: obiekt z emaila rozpoznawalny, forma złamana, błędy celowe, anarchia proporcji i perspektywy.
system_for_groq:
Jesteś generatorem promptów FLUX dla stylu AbsurdStyle444 — kontrolowany chaos wizualny. Na podstawie TREŚCI EMAILA wygenerujesz angielski prompt (max 140 słów) dla małej ilustracji emotki.

KROK 1 — zanim napiszesz prompt, zidentyfikuj z emaila:
  - JEDEN główny obiekt fizyczny (np. kilof, pies, laptop, samochód, ziemniaki)
  - EMOCJĘ nadawcy (złość, smutek, nuda, strach, spokój)
  - JEDNO konkretne działanie lub sytuację z emaila

KROK 2 — zbuduj prompt według AbsurdStyle444:
  - Obiekt z emaila MUSI być w kadrze i wchodzić w interakcję z postacią
  - Zastosuj parametry chaosu: złamana perspektywa, zdeformowane proporcje, przerywane kontury, losowe artefakty
  - Postać wyraża emocję Tylera wobec emaila — pogarda, nihilizm, rozbawienie
  - Styl: surowy szkic, grube nieregularne linie, kreskówkowy chaos, nie-estetyczny, celowo brzydki
  - Format: mały kadr jak panel zinu lub naklejka
  - ZAKAZ: czystych linii, estetyki, anime, 3D, digital art

KROK 3 — dodaj na końcu promptu obowiązkowo: 'AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch, broken proportions, interrupted contours, anarchic perspective, raw ugly lines, intentional drawing errors, visual noise, dense marks'

Zwróć TYLKO prompt angielski — bez wyjaśnień, bez polskich słów.

absurd_style_params.opis: AbsurdStyle444 — wartości parametrów dla emotki Tylera
absurd_style_params.nota: Obiekt z emaila rozpoznawalny (~65) żeby było wiadomo co to jest, ale forma złamana (~75) żeby nie wyglądało estetycznie. Jeśli wygląda ładnie — za niski chaos.

style_base: AbsurdStyle444 rough chaotic sketch on aged paper, broken proportions intentional, interrupted contours, anarchic perspective, raw ugly irregular lines, deliberate drawing errors, visual noise and artifacts, dense aggressive marks, underground zine panel, small format sticker, no clean lines, no polish, no beauty, single figure interacting with specific object from email
negative_prompt: clean lines, polished, beautiful, aesthetic, anime, cartoon smooth, digital art, 3d render, watermark, realistic photo, gradient, soft shading, professional illustration, symmetrical
przyklad_dobry: Hunched figure in broken perspective, grotesquely elongated arms clutching a warped coal pickaxe twice its body size, sitting on a giant misshapen dog with text-like scribbles instead of fur, figure has one enormous eye and one missing, interrupted contours throughout, random ink splatters, chaotic hatching going in wrong directions, figure seems to be melting into the dog, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch, broken proportions, interrupted contours, anarchic perspective, raw ugly lines, intentional drawing errors, visual noise, dense marks
przyklad_zly: minimalist black ink figure standing alone on empty background (ZLE — brak obiektu z emaila, brak chaosu, zbyt minimalistyczne)

fallback_prompts.zlosc: Hunched figure with disproportionately huge clenched fist punching through warped office desk, papers flying in wrong directions, broken perspective, one leg longer than torso, interrupted contours, coffee mug floating impossibly, aggressive scratchy hatching, ink blobs, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch broken proportions interrupted contours anarchic perspective raw ugly lines intentional drawing errors visual noise dense marks
fallback_prompts.smutek: Tiny shrunken figure dwarfed by enormous drooping objects around it, posture collapsed inward, arms at wrong angles, hatching lines going every direction, puddle beneath figure made of broken curved lines, one eye dot one eye X, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch broken proportions interrupted contours anarchic perspective raw ugly lines intentional drawing errors visual noise dense marks
fallback_prompts.radosc: Figure with manic jagged grin wider than its head, arms at impossible upward angles, dancing on top of burning objects, proportions all wrong, legs as short stumps, background full of chaotic scribbles and artefacts, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch broken proportions interrupted contours anarchic perspective raw ugly lines intentional drawing errors visual noise dense marks
fallback_prompts.lek: Figure compressed small in corner, surrounded by enormous looming objects closing in, eyes as two huge spirals, body outline interrupted and incomplete, background dense aggressive hatching, objects from email grown to monstrous scale, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch broken proportions interrupted contours anarchic perspective raw ugly lines intentional drawing errors visual noise dense marks
fallback_prompts.nuda: Figure completely flat and melting horizontally into chair, limbs pooling on floor, objects from email floating ignored around it, cigarette burning to impossible length, face a single drooping line, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch broken proportions interrupted contours anarchic perspective raw ugly lines intentional drawing errors visual noise dense marks
fallback_prompts.spokoj: Figure standing completely still and small in center while everything around it is exploding and falling apart, objects from email disintegrating in background, figure has no expression just two dots for eyes, chaos radiating outward from calm center, AbsurdStyle444: rough chaotic sketch broken proportions interrupted contours anarchic perspective raw ugly lines intentional drawing errors visual noise dense marks
